home.heroSubtitle: 107 homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms featuring spacious terraces, a pool and Mediterranean views.
home.aboutText1: Located in one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca, La Nucía One offers you a Mediterranean lifestyle with spacious homes, large windows and a carefully designed layout.
home.aboutText2: A complete communal equipment designed for enjoyment: infinity pool, coworking, gym, landscaped gardens, children's area and much more.
home.locationText: La Nucía is one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca. With an exceptional climate, excellent infrastructure and a strategic location between the mountains and the sea.
home.homesText: Spacious homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms featuring top-quality finishes, generous terraces and south-facing orientation.
home.type3desc: Perfect balance between space and functionality
home.galleryText: Explore the images of La Nucía One: facades, interiors, communal areas and the privileged surroundings.
home.contactText: Contact us for more information, detailed plans and conditions. No obligation.

stats.desc1: Space, light and a carefully designed layout.
stats.desc2: Enjoy the pool, coworking, gym and much more.

description.locationText: In La Nucía, close to everything.
description.paragraph1: Located in one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca, this residential complex allows you to enjoy tranquility with nearby green spaces.
description.paragraph2: La Nucía One offers you a Mediterranean lifestyle. Spacious homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms, large windows and a carefully designed layout.
description.buildingAlt: New construction building in La Nucía

ubicacionPage.title: Privileged location
ubicacionPage.aboutText1: La Nucía is one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca. Surrounded by the Sierra de Aitana and just a few kilometres from the sea, it combines the tranquility of the interior with proximity to all coastal services.
ubicacionPage.aboutText2: Its excellent sports and cultural infrastructure, including the Ciudad Deportiva Camilo Cano, make it a unique destination for families, athletes and those seeking an active Mediterranean lifestyle.

advantages.title: Ideal climate
advantages.description: Over 300 sunny days a year with mild temperatures year-round.

advantages.title: Mountains and sea
advantages.description: Between the Sierra de Aitana and the Costa Blanca beaches.

advantages.title: Full services
advantages.description: Supermarkets, restaurants, shops and all services within reach.

advantages.title: Nearby beaches
advantages.description: Altea, Albir and Benidorm beaches less than 10 minutes away.

advantages.title: Nature
advantages.description: Hiking trails, natural parks and green spaces.

advantages.title: Health & wellness
advantages.description: Health centres, hospitals and top-tier sports facilities.

viviendasPage.heroSubtitle: Your home in La Nucía, with everything you need always nearby.
viviendasPage.conceptText1: La Nucía One is born from the idea of creating a residential complex that combines contemporary architecture with the Mediterranean lifestyle. Each home has been designed to maximise natural light, views and functionality.
viviendasPage.conceptText2: Large windows, generous terraces and an intelligent layout that turns every space into a place to enjoy. A project designed for those seeking quality of life without compromising on design.

types.title: 2 Bedrooms
types.description: Optimised layout with spacious terraces and south-facing orientation. Ideal for couples or as an investment.

types.title: 3 Bedrooms
types.description: The perfect balance between space and functionality for the whole family.

types.title: 4 Bedrooms
types.description: Maximum space and comfort with the best views and premium finishes.

featuresList.title: PVC carpentry
featuresList.description: Climalit-type glass windows for maximum insulation
